support.ticketSubmitted: Your support ticket has been submitted!
support.faq1Title: How do I upload media file?
support.faq1Desc: You can upload documents, images, or videos through the Raise New Ticket form. Simply tap on the upload button and select files from your gallery.
support.faq2Desc: To create a support ticket, you need to provide a subject, detailed description, your email address, and mobile number. Media attachments are optional but recommended.
support.faq3Title: Can I edit a posted job?
support.faq3Desc: Yes, you can edit active jobs through the Jobs section. Navigate to your active jobs, select the job you want to edit, and tap the edit button.
support.faq4Desc: To raise a dispute, go to the job details, and select the 'Raise Dispute' option. Fill in the dispute details and submit. Our support team will review and contact you.
support.raiseFirstTicket: Tap "Raise New Ticket" to create your first support request

terms.def1: “App” refers to the TrabajoYA! mobile application.
terms.def2: “User” refers to anyone who creates an account, including Businesses, Workers, Contractors, or Service Providers.
terms.def3: “Employer” or “Business” refers to users who post jobs or seek labor.
terms.def4: “Worker” refers to users who accept and perform jobs listed on the platform.
terms.def5: “Services” refer to any features, functionality, and job-matching services provided by the app.
terms.eligibilityText: You must be 18+ and legally allowed to work or hire labor in your country.
terms.accountUseText: Provide accurate info during sign-up. You’re responsible for keeping your login secure.
terms.serviceOverviewText: TrabajoYA! connects businesses with skilled and unskilled workers. We’re not an employer—just a platform.
terms.jobPostingsText: Employers must post clear job details. Workers should only apply if qualified. We’re not liable for job-related disputes.
terms.paymentsText: Employers must post clear job details. Workers should only apply if qualified. We’re not liable for job-related disputes.
terms.reviewsText: Users can leave reviews after job completion. Abuse of the review system can lead to bans.
terms.userConductText: No harassment, fraud, or unlawful activity. Respect others and follow all labor laws.
terms.terminationText: We can suspend or remove accounts that violate these terms or our community guidelines.
terms.privacyText: See our [Privacy Policy] for how we collect and use your data.
terms.updatesText: Terms may change. Continued use means you accept the latest version.
